sectiondef.header: Defined BR Class of Device (CoD) values

briefdescription.para: LAN/Network Access Point major device class.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Computer Major Class

briefdescription.para: Desktop workstation computer minor device class.
Handheld PC/PDA computer minor device class.
Palm-sized PC/PDA computer minor device class.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Phone Major Class

briefdescription.para: Wired modem or voice gateway phone minor device class.
Common ISDN access phone minor device class.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - LAN/Network Major Class - Service Utilization

briefdescription.para: LAN service utilization: no service available.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - LAN/Network Major Class - Device Type

briefdescription.para: Minor Device Class - Audio/Video Major Class.
Wearable headset audio/video minor device class.
Portable audio audio/video minor device class.
Car audio audio/video minor device class.
Set-top box audio/video minor device class.
HiFi audio audio/video minor device class.
Video camera audio/video minor device class.
Video monitor audio/video minor device class.
Video display and loudspeaker audio/video minor device class.
Video conferencing audio/video minor device class.
Gaming toy audio/video minor device class.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Peripheral Major Class - Input Device Type

briefdescription.para: Peripheral input: no keyboard, no pointing device.
Peripheral input: combo keyboard and pointing device.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Peripheral Major Class - Device Type

briefdescription.para: Handheld gestural input peripheral device type.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Imaging Major Class

briefdescription.para: Minor Device Class - Imaging Major Class.
Minor Device Class - Imaging Major Class Uncategorized.

sectiondef.header: Minor Device Class - Wearable Major Class
Minor Device Class - Toy Major Class
Minor Device Class - Health Major Class

briefdescription.para: Bluetooth Assigned Numbers, codes and identifiers.
